message:
feat(web): add async Cx-aware handler implementations for up to 4 extractors

Extends the web handler system with async handler support that threads
the asupersync Cx (context) through request processing, enabling
handlers to access the runtime context (regions, budgets, capabilities).

New public types:
- AsyncCxFnHandler<F>: wraps async Cx-aware functions as handlers
- Implementations for 0, 1, 2, 3, and 4 extractor arities

New internal helpers:
- extract_arg_1 through extract_arg_4: ergonomic extractor combinators
  that convert extraction failures to responses

Each arity is tested with compile-time type assertions. The
implementation mirrors the existing synchronous Handler impls but adds
Cx propagation and Future-based execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
